title: Procedural Trees
description: This allows a builder to create a forest with custom trees in seconds by spawning a spawn egg, each tree different from one another.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d147b52acaa1cf04891b05a68cb38fc9035cbe6.png)

# Information
This adds randomly generated trees for builders to add to far distance forests or for coder to implement rng tree's to minecraft! Builds or code using this datapack should include the download link to this site in the discription of your project.

## Getting the tree spawn egg
Use this command to get the tree spawn eggs  /function tree:admin_give_items

## Tree Examples

Trees
![Trees](https://i.postimg.cc/QxV87Ygm/2025-02-05-19-47-54.png)

## Items
There will be a couple items, the bogged spawn eggs are the trees. The slime spawn eggs are the bushes. The snowballs are the grasses and the oak forest. Either use them by spawning in the entity or throwing at a grass or dirt related block.

Example of the items:
![Items](https://i.postimg.cc/3NqH97jB/2025-02-05-19-46-17.png)
